description_long: This object is a circular frisbee with a segmented design, featuring alternating red and dark gray quadrants on its top surface. The frisbee has a slightly domed center, which is accentuated by a raised circular hub, and small metallic-looking rivets or dots are visible at the junctions of the colored segments and around the central hub. The edge of the frisbee is thin and uniform, giving it an aerodynamic profile suitable for flight. The surface appears smooth and hard, likely made from molded plastic, with a matte to semi-gloss finish. The color pattern is bold and visually striking, making the frisbee easy to spot during play in urban parks or recreational areas. There are no visible logos, text, or decorative graphics beyond the color segmentation.
description: A round frisbee with alternating red and dark gray segments, a domed center hub, and a smooth, hard surface. The design is simple yet bold, with small metallic dots at the segment junctions.
description_view_0: The frisbee is seen from a slightly elevated angle, showing the red and gray segments and the central hub with metallic dots clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the opposite side of the frisbee, maintaining the same color segmentation and central hub, with the red and gray areas reversed in position.
description_view_2: The alternating color pattern and central hub are visible, with the red segments appearing more prominent from this angle.
description_view_3: The frisbee's red and gray segments are again visible, with the central hub and metallic dots clearly defined, similar to the other views but rotated.
attribute_pattern_design: Alternating red and dark gray quadrants with small metallic dots at the segment junctions.
attribute_central_emblem: Raised circular hub in the center, plain with no emblem or icon.
